next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:8000 from the LAN and sign in (or complete first-run admin setup if admin bootstrap is disabled).
Drop files into /opt/paperless-ngx/consume on the CT for automatic import.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/paperless-ngx-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Optional later: set paperless_ngx.public_url, add BIND A record and nginx-waf upstream when exposing via HTTPS.
